trigger.description: The memory was persisted, but bounded workflow auto-linking failed.
setup_commands: ee remember 'J6 workflow auto-link seed.' --workflow j6-auto-link --no-propose-candidates --workspace . --json
trigger.invocation: ee remember 'J6 workflow auto-link trigger.' --workflow j6-auto-link --no-propose-candidates --workspace . --json

expected_emission.repair_string: Run `ee doctor --json` and inspect memory link indexes.
